meta.purpose: Structured change tracking across swap files. Each citation is a decision, build, or design event. Supersedes chains track when decisions evolve. Tags enable filtering by subsystem. This file is LakeSpeak-ingestible.

!CLAUDE_SWAP.md.note: Full history to Jan 2026. Read-only reference.

!CLAUDE_SWAP_2.md.note: Contains GlueEngine spec, FormatDetector spec, Market Oracle docs, open contracts, drift audit. Reference for implementation details.

!CLAUDE_SWAP_3.md.note: Clean active state. Links to SWAP_2 for spec details via citation IDs. No duplicated specs.

citations.note: Drift #5 resolved. Market Oracle runs inside Clearbox via plugin runner BUT does not depend on Clearbox to function. Listed in BOTH plugin list AND [SEPARATE]. No rebuild needed — existing 15-file structure already supports this.

citations.what: Swap file is LakeSpeak-ingestible system knowledge (SWAP_AS_CORPUS)
Drift audit — 7 drifts found, 4 fixed, 2 need Lee
Swap file evolution — SWAP_3 created as active state, SWAP_2 becomes specs reference
Drift #5 RESOLVED — Market Oracle = Hybrid. Plugin inside Clearbox AND standalone. Both lists.
citations.note: No code change needed. plugin/market_oracle/ structure already clean. Mounts via Clearbox plugin runner, also works standalone. Add to [SEPARATE] list with note: also available as Clearbox plugin.

citations.what: Drift #7 RESOLVED — census_score IS the ingest co-occurrence counts. BM25 0.40 / census 0.60 CONFIRMED.
citations.note: Census = adjacency co-occurrence counts built during lexicon mapping/ingest. Replaces dense (embedding similarity). census_score expands query tokens through the adjacency map and scores chunks by intersection. The 0.60 weight is earned — census knows positions AND semantic proximity. Dense only knew proximity. BM25 0.40 / census 0.60 is the confirmed weighting. Not tunable for now — this is the settled architecture.
